name: @ont/indexer
description: ONT clean runnable indexer service. Batch block-ingestion (no HTTP) — an imperative shell that drives the @ont/adapter-indexer inclusion firewall over an injected store port; no consensus/firewall rule reimplementation.

scripts.test: npm run build -w @ont/protocol && npm run build -w @ont/wire && npm run build -w @ont/bitcoin && npm run build -w @ont/consensus && npm run build -w @ont/evidence && npm run build -w @ont/claim-path && npm run build -w @ont/anchor-store && npm run build -w @ont/header-store && npm run build -w @ont/name-state-store && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-indexer && npm run build -w @ont/adapter-da && npm run build -w @ont/launch-config && npm run build -w @ont/node-live && vitest run
